input.command:
python3 -c "
with open('/home/bot4u/Desktop/GEMINI/Mini_project_test_copy/frontend/script.js', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
    
lines = content.split('\n')
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    if 'addEventListener' in line and 'function' in line:
        # Check for balanced parentheses
        open_paren = line.count('(')
        close_paren = line.count(')')
        if open_paren != close_paren:
            print(f'Line {i}: {line.strip()}')
            print(f'  Open: {open_paren}, Close: {close_paren}')
"

state.title: Find lines with unbalanced parentheses
